rule_text: Setup: use every cell of an empty 4×4 board. Player 0 moves first; turns alternate, and each move places one stone on an empty cell. Player 0's first stone must be on the top row; Player 1's first stone must be on the left column. After that player's first stone, every new stone must be within one king move of exactly 1 friendly stone. Player 0 wins by connecting the top and bottom edges with one group connected through king-move adjacency; Player 1 wins by connecting the left and right edges with one group connected through king-move adjacency. If the next player has no legal placement and the previous move did not win, the previous player wins.
